title: Integrate OpenAI responses client and oracle handler
acceptance_criteria: OpenAI client streams gpt-5-nano responses using sanitized developer/user prompts mirroring Streamlit behavior
POST /api/oracle accepts JSON or multipart payload, resizes image to <=1024px, stores temp file securely and cleans up
Handler streams incremental output (SSE or chunked JSON) to callers and propagates errors with structured payloads
Service logs request lifecycle with PII-safe metadata and honours prompt-injection safeguards
